'''navanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placentomegaly|placentomegaly]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placentomegaly|placentomegaly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| navanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nævængæth|nævængæth]] || [[word:nævængæj|nævængæj]] || [[word:nævængæsh|nævængæsh]] || [[word:nævængæ|nævængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:navavangath|navavangath]] || [[word:navavangaj|navavangaj]] || [[word:navavangash|navavangash]] || [[word:navavanga|navavanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:navangath|navangath]] || [[word:navangaj|navangaj]] || [[word:navangash|navangash]] || [[word:navanga|navanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:navafngath|navafngath]] || [[word:navafngaj|navafngaj]] || [[word:navafngash|navafngash]] || [[word:navafngaf|navafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navangatha|navangatha]] || [[word:navangaja|navangaja]] || [[word:navangasha|navangasha]] || [[word:navangaka|navangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navangath|navangath]] || [[word:navangaj|navangaj]] || [[word:navangash|navangash]] || [[word:navanga|navanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navangathal|navangathal]] || [[word:navangajal|navangajal]] || [[word:navangashal|navangashal]] || [[word:navangakal|navangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navangathatha|navangathatha]] || [[word:navangajaja|navangajaja]] || [[word:navangashasha|navangashasha]] || [[word:navangaka|navangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navangathan|navangathan]] || [[word:navangajan|navangajan]] || [[word:navangashan|navangashan]] || [[word:navangakan|navangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navangathaoro|navangathaoro]] || [[word:navangajaoro|navangajaoro]] || [[word:navangashaoro|navangashaoro]] || [[word:navangakaoro|navangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
